title: 🔮 Alchemy System Guide
footer: Veyra • Alchemy Help • Tip: Use /details potions

pages.title: 🔮 Alchemy Overview
pages.description:
Alchemy lets you brew potions that grant powerful status effects.

Potions provide strong buffs but increase **Strain**, which raises the chance future potions fail.

For exact potion recipes and effects, use:
`/details potions`

fields.name: Core Idea
fields.value:
• Brew potions using ingredients
• Drink potions to gain effects
• Manage Strain so your body doesn’t reject potions

pages.title: ⚗️ Brewing Stand
pages.description:
You must own a **Brewing Stand** to brew potions.

Your Brewing Stand level limits what tier of potion you can craft.

fields.name: Stand Tiers
fields.value:
Level 1 → Tier 1 potions
Level 2 → Tier 1-2 potions
Level 3 → Tier 1-3 potions

fields.name: Using your potions
fields.value:
`!use <potion name>`
eg: !use Potion Of Faster Recovery I

pages.title: ✨ Effects System
pages.description: Potions apply status effects to you.

fields.name: Rules
fields.value:
• Only one active effect at a time
• New effect overwrites old effect
• Effects may expire
• Some effects are infinite

pages.title: ☣️ Strain System
pages.description: Strain represents how poisoned your body is from potion usage.

fields.name: How It Works
fields.value:
• Strain range: 0 - 100
• Strain value = % chance potion fails
• At 100 strain → potion always fails
• Strain slowly decreases over time

fields.name: Notes
fields.value:
• Failed strain roll wastes the potion
• Expired effects automatically deactivate
• Stronger potions usually add more strain
